coreIssue: This bi-weekly check-in should test whether a Senior Backend Engineer is simply decompressing after launch or needs support around next-quarter ownership.
openingQuestion: What feels most important to sort out after Monday’s launch so you can be clear on what you want to own next quarter?
listenFor: whether she names a specific unresolved thread from the launch or treats this week as normal cooldown
whether she volunteers a concrete next-quarter scope before you mention the billing rewrite
if they describe mentoring with a specific person, cadence, or recent moment instead of speaking only in general interest
avoid: do not treat her quieter week as a problem before she gives you context
do not introduce the billing rewrite too early and anchor the conversation before hearing her own ownership plans
goodOutcome: You and Priya have agreed what senior-level ownership she wants next quarter and whether mentoring is part of that scope or a separate stretch.
suggestedAction: During the 1:1, let her name her expected next-quarter ownership first, then test it against one concrete example of support you could provide.
